package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for soft_delete_filters_written_manually_in_many_queries: Repeated `deleted_at IS NULL` style filters rather than a shared repository or scope policy.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule188NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule188NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule188NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario188Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule188NegativeService, input Rule188NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
